title: Life Steal [NanoVirus]
description: Kill players to get more heart!
body:
This datapack adds lifesteal to minecraft!

You start with 20 hearts. 
You can withdraw your heart and make it an item using /trigger Give_Life command.

When you kill a player you will get his heart.

When you die you will lose one heart.

If you have 0 hearts its game over for you.


Have fun!
